message:
docs: update parity certification to NOT_CERTIFIED and add drop-in gate verdict

- FEATURE_PARITY.md: refresh date to 2026-02-18, add release claim
  guardrail pointing to dropin-certification-verdict.json
- parity-certification.json: change verdict from CERTIFIED to NOT_CERTIFIED
  with explicit blocking reasons across CLI, JSON/RPC, SDK, config/env,
  session/errors, integration I/O, differential-testing, and quality-gates
- provider-canonical-id-table.json: add entries for openai-codex,
  google-gemini-cli, google-antigravity providers; add aliases for
  kimi-coding/kimi-code, vercel-ai-gateway, azure-openai-responses
- dropin-certification-verdict.json: new hard-gate certification artifact
  tracking 14 gates (3 pass, 8 fail, 3 blocked), overall NOT_CERTIFIED

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
 # Feature Parity: pi_agent_rust vs Pi Agent (TypeScript)
 
 > **Purpose:** Authoritative single-source-of-truth for implementation status.
-> **Last Updated:** 2026-02-14 (Final parity certification: all 🔶 resolved to ✅, zero gaps remaining)
+> **Last Updated:** 2026-02-18 (implementation snapshot refresh)
+> **Release Claim Guardrail:** This document is progress evidence only. Strict drop-in replacement language is blocked unless `docs/dropin-certification-verdict.json` reports `overall_verdict = CERTIFIED`.
 
 ## Status Legend

+    },
+    {
+      "gate_id": "G05-json-rpc-parity",

+    },

+    {
+      "gate_id": "G10-differential-evidence-suite",
+      "status": "blocked",
+      "reason": "Differential-testing hard gate domain remains open and not fully closed with certifying evidence."
+    },
+    {
+      "gate_id": "G11-test-architecture-and-ci-enforcement",
+      "status": "blocked",
+      "reason": "Quality-gates domain remains open; release gate audit currently reports failing evidence-contract status."
+    },
+    {
+      "gate_id": "G12-claim-language-alignment",
+      "status": "pass",
+      "reason": "Parity documents are now conditioned on drop-in certification verdict instead of strict replacement claims."
+    }
+  ],
+  "blocking_reasons": [
+    "Open critical gaps: gap-sdk-contract-shape, gap-cli-extension-flag-pass-through, gap-json-rpc-command-semantic-coverage.",
+    "Open high-severity drop-in gaps remain across CLI, JSON/RPC, extension lifecycle, integration I/O, and config-default domains.",
+    "Contract immediate-status snapshot marks open critical hard-gate domains: cli, json-and-rpc, sdk, config-and-env, session-and-errors, integration-io, differential-testing, quality-gates.",
+    "Strict drop-in release language is fail-closed until every hard gate is pass."
+  ],
+  "evidence_index": [

+    {

+    },
+    {

+      "description": "Owned parity gaps with severity and closure paths"
+    },
+    {

+    },
+    {

+    {
+      "path": "tests/e2e_results/20260208T080120Z/evidence_contract.json",

+    }
+  ]
+}
